summary: Phase 3 EMI & SIP Analytics: All 34 backend tests passed (100%). Verified all 5 new endpoints: EMI Overview (P vs I split), Prepayment Calculator (tenure/EMI reduction), SIP Dashboard (discipline score), Wealth Projector (3 scenarios), Goal Mapper (gap analysis).

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only)

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 EMI/SIP analytics endpoints implemented correctly with proper authentication
EMI Overview returns comprehensive data: total_principal_paid, total_interest_paid, total_outstanding, interest_to_principal_ratio, per-loan breakdown, monthly_timeline (last 24 months)
Prepayment Calculator supports both 'tenure' and 'emi' reduction modes with accurate interest savings calculation
SIP Dashboard returns discipline_score (0-100%), category_allocation, and detailed SIP list with monthly_equivalent
Wealth Projector returns 3 standard scenarios (conservative 8%, moderate 12%, aggressive 15%) plus optional custom return rate
Goal Mapper returns gap analysis with sip_needed_monthly calculation using 12% expected return
All endpoints correctly reject unauthenticated requests (401)
Data consistency verified across endpoints (EMI overview matches prepayment, SIP dashboard matches goal-map)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo user with 1 loan, 2 SIPs, 3 goals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 EMI & SIP Analytics fully tested. All 5 endpoints working: EMI Overview (GET /api/emi-analytics/overview), Prepayment Calculator (POST /api/emi-analytics/prepayment), SIP Dashboard (GET /api/sip-analytics/dashboard), Wealth Projector (POST /api/sip-analytics/wealth-projection), Goal Mapper (POST /api/sip-analytics/goal-map). Test loan ID: e32fd46a-6fd2-4f10-8656-ecf8202ff69a (50L Home Loan @ 8.5%, 240 months). Demo user has 2 active SIPs with discipline_score of 100%.

/api/emi-analytics/overview GET.response_fields: total_principal_paid, total_interest_paid, total_outstanding, total_emi_per_month, interest_to_principal_ratio, loans[], monthly_timeline[]
/api/emi-analytics/overview GET.loans_fields: id, name, loan_type, principal_amount, interest_rate, tenure_months, emi_amount, principal_paid, interest_paid, outstanding, total_interest_lifetime, total_cost, progress_pct, remaining_emis

/api/emi-analytics/prepayment POST.response_fields: loan_name, original_tenure_months, original_emi, original_total_interest, original_total_paid, new_tenure_months, new_emi, new_total_interest, new_total_paid, interest_saved, tenure_saved_months
/api/emi-analytics/prepayment POST.edge_cases_tested: Zero prepayment, full prepayment (clears loan), invalid loan_id (404), reduce_type=tenure, reduce_type=emi

/api/sip-analytics/dashboard GET.summary_fields: total_sips, active_sips, paused_sips, total_monthly_commitment, total_invested, total_executions, estimated_portfolio_value, discipline_score
/api/sip-analytics/dashboard GET.sip_fields: id, name, amount, frequency, category, is_active, monthly_equivalent, total_invested, execution_count, next_execution, start_date

/api/sip-analytics/wealth-projection POS.features_tested: Auto-fill from DB when 0 inputs, custom return rate, yearly projection timeline

/api/sip-analytics/goal-map POST.response_fields: total_monthly_sip, total_goals, goals_on_track, goal_analysis[], unmapped_sips[], active_sips[]
/api/sip-analytics/goal-map POST.goal_analysis_fields: goal_id, goal_title, target_amount, current_amount, gap, deadline, months_left, sip_needed_monthly, mapped_sip_amount, shortfall, on_track, mapped_sips[]

Authentication.note: All 5 endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests

Data_Consistency.note: EMI overview matches prepayment data, SIP dashboard matches goal-map data, wealth projection auto-fill uses dashboard data

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - no mocking
